Argument Reference

The following arguments are supported:

  • display_name - (Required) (Updatable) User provided display name of the Java download token.
  • description - (Required) (Updatable) User provided description of the Java download token.
  • compartment_id - (Required) The OCID of the compartment that contains the Java download token.
  • time_expires - (Required) (Updatable) Expiry time of the token.
  • java_version - (Required) The Java version associated with the token.
  • license_type - (Required) (Updatable) License types associated with the Java download token.
  • is_default - (Optional) (Updatable) Whether the Java download token is the default token.
  • freeform_tags - (Optional) (Updatable) Free-form tags for this resource.
  • defined_tags - (Optional) (Updatable) Defined tags for this resource.
